title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The oils have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that contribute to periodontal disease, such as Porphyromonas gingivalis and Streptococcus mutans.
